title: UPI OC 163A FY23 24 Addendum to OC 163 Furthering interoperability in the UPI ecosystem
text:
NZE)p

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/2023-24/0C.163A 23'4 October 2023

To,
All Members, Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Subject: Addendum to OC 163 — Furthering interoperability in the UPI
ecosystem

Vide reference to NPCI UPI OC 163 dated 20" March, 2023, NPCI has defined the
first set of compliances towards the objective of furthering the interoperability in the
UPI ecosystem. As per aforementioned operating circular, the deadline to comply with
the guidelines was 30'" September 2023.

It is understood from various acquiring members that necessary changes mentioned
in OC 163 are still under development. Based on ecosystem requirements, the
compliance date for OC 163 has been extended till 31S December 2023.

Compliance Update:

For online app-based and mobile web-based merchants, a new provision has been
introduced. It is now permitted to display the 'Pay by any UPI App' button in any place
(prominently) under the UPI section. As per NPCI UPI OC 163, this button will call for
UPI Intent. ‘Pay by any UPI App’ button, when clicked, should display all active UPI
apps in the device without any discrimination.

Itis imperative that this button is not only present but also prominently visible, ensuring
equal access for all apps through UPI Intent. This visibility and accessibility are
paramount to fostering interoperability within the UP] ecosystem.

All UPI Members are requested to comply with the respective compliances by
aforementioned timeline.

Please make note of the above and disseminate the instructions contained herein to
the officials concerned.

Your’s sincerely,
SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10% Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 O51.
